_comment: wake-inbox/ = David's wake-request channel. He writes files here
(e.g. wake-inbox/current.md). Publisher shards those into the
prefix. See FolderRecord.writeMany. The pubkey below MUST equal
that derivation (a mismatch throws at write time).
Turnstone-side watcher subscribes to this sub-Record's pubkey
and wakes Claude when content advances.
turnstone/ and watcher/ mounts intentionally omitted from this
MVP — they need their own identities/Records to be established,
which is separate work. Add back as foreign mounts (ours:false)
Pubkey derivation: see env/david.json comment or run
